highlights: Status enum drift: worker uses done/error, commander uses success/partial, SKILL treats only done/completed as success (SKILL.md:613-618)
Commander bundle schema underspecified; real bundles use adopted_consensus_item_ids vs adopted_consensus (results/commander-001.json vs commander-003.json)
Synthesizer defaults missing task_id/status to unknown; missing task_id observed (results/atm-009.json)
Example report JSONs use different schemas than worker/commander contracts; no discriminated schema versioning
